chunks.text: The MSAJCE Sports Club maintains records of sports and games events attended by students within the college and beyond, submits annual reports on sports/events, conducts sports events, and rewards achievements.

Does MSAJCE have a cricket team?
Does MSAJCE have a football team?
What are the objectives of the MSAJCE Sports Club?
Does MSAJCE conduct inter-college sports events?

chunks.section: MSAJCE Fine Arts Club (ENVISTA CLUB — ARTFUL AESTHETICS)
chunks.text: The Fine Arts Club aims to encourage student talent, provide skill-based training, and organize events for creative expression in areas like dance, art, singing, and music.
possible_questions: What is the MSAJCE Fine Arts Club?
What is ENVISTA CLUB at MSAJCE?

What activities does the Fine Arts Club conduct?
Does MSAJCE have a dance or music club?
What is the vision of the MSAJCE Fine Arts Club?
How many clubs are part of ENVISTA CLUB?

chunks.text: The Science Club was established to invite eminent scientists to share their experiences and promote interest in science and technology among students through various activities.
